title: Cobblemon Cindoria
description: A Cobblemon Data/Reasource Pack that Adds Custom Pokemon Among other things like custom trainers and spawns
body:
# Custom Data/Texture Pack for [Createmon : Cindoria](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/createmon-cindoria)

To Get a form in game do /pokegive [Playername] [Pokemon Name] cindorian=true

**SOME Additions Include**
- Sharky Garchomp, Water Dragon Typing
- Leafy Tyrantrum, Grass Dragon Typing
- Cog Klink Link, Inspired off Create
- Valentines Day Skins
+ More

Most Additions change more than just how the pokemon Looks
- Abilities
- Movesets
- Typing

### ALSO ADDS A NEW RADICAL TRAINERS GYM SET WITH FULLY CUSTOM GYM LEADERS
### 
Feel free to use this for anything that is not monitary, Example : Crates on a server is not allowed, but a Video is fine....essentially just dont make people pay to use or play with these <3

Artist Credits
- Nivia Yukihyo
- RoseyStar
- ShinyFlygonttv
- KingofTheSink
